title: Cortyg brandy
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Food |image=[[File:Cortyg.png]] |name=Cortyg brandy |origin=[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] |date= |race=[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] |creator= |found= |type= |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible=*[[Human/Legends|Humans]] *Wookiees |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|This is tame? I'd hate to see what the Wookiees drink!''"
"''What do you expect? They're Wookiees.|[[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], to [[Groshik]], after tasting Cortyg brandy|''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''}} '''Cortyg [[Brandy/Legends|brandy]]''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|incredibly hard]] drink brewed on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It came in two different variations, the "wilder" side, drunk by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] and the "tamer" Cortyg that tasted smoother. The "tamer" variant was sold to offworlders at high prices. [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] owner and bartender [[Groshik]] offered Cortyg brandy to [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]] after a sabacc game in which Dessel won the sabacc pot and after Dessel was nearly killed by a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' *{{GalaxiesAED}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|12|WOO 1-4|Wookiees}} *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Cortyg (Schematic)}} {{Interlang |de=Cortyg-Branntwein }} [[Category:Brandies]] [[Category:Wookiee food]]
